# LEZAC explosion playback oracle malformed fixture.
# Lane division scratch values only prove pre-division locals when the observed
# freeze is the forward/reverse divide callsite at 1000:3CE3 or 1000:3E77.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1
instrumented_lane_div_scratch_present=1
instrumented_lane_div_cs_offset=0x3d23
instrumented_lane_div_kind=forward
instrumented_lane_div_ax=0xfff7
instrumented_lane_div_dx=0xffff
instrumented_lane_div_cx=0x0001
instrumented_lane_div_bx=0x0000
instrumented_lane_div_active_count=0x0001
instrumented_lane_div_loop_index=0x0001
instrumented_lane_div_weight_local=0x0001
instrumented_lane_div_numerator_low=0xfff7
instrumented_lane_div_numerator_high=0xffff

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:4C96 runtime=1A2B:4C96 label=effect_forward_pass_call observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
